chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْقَبْرَ وَ مَنْ لَا يَدْخُلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 63 – The one who enters the grave and the one who does not enter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/91)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/91)
text: الزَّوْجُ أَحَقُّ بِامْرَأَتِهِ حَتَّى يَضَعَهَا فِي قَبْرِهَا .

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Awrama, from Ali Bin Maysara, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The husband is more rightful with his wife until he places her in her grave’.
en.sarwar: 6. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Uramah from Ali ibn Maysarah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a husband is more rightful to place his wife in the grave.”
